criteria.description: npm test passes (exit 0, all tests green)
criteria.notes: 19 test suites, 113/113 tests passed in 2.937s. 0 failures, 0 skipped.

criteria.description: config.json written to PORTABLE_EXECUTABLE_DIR in packaged mode, cwd in dev
criteria.notes: src/main/store/config.ts:15-25 resolveConfigDir() returns process.env.PORTABLE_EXECUTABLE_DIR when isPackaged, falls back to process.cwd().

criteria.description: OAuth access_token and refresh_token stored via keytar, never written to config.json
criteria.notes: src/main/store/auth.ts:46-55 saveTokens() calls keytar.setPassword for both KEYTAR_ACCOUNT_ACCESS and KEYTAR_ACCOUNT_REFRESH. config.ts Config type (via normalize()) does not serialize any access_token/refresh_token fields.
server.ts:166-175 sends 200 with overlay HTML; src/overlay/index.html:13 sets body { background: transparent; }.

criteria.description: GET /media/:id returns 200 for registered file, 404 after deregister
criteria.notes: server.ts:177-195 handles /media/:id with registry.resolve() -> 404 if missing, sendFile otherwise. Integration tests tests/integration/overlay-server.test.ts:100 (get_media_returns_file), :115 (get_media_404_after_deregister), :127 (get_media_404_for_unknown_id) all pass.

criteria.description: EventSub subscription POST fires on session_welcome (within 10s)
criteria.notes: src/main/twitch/eventsub.ts:135-143: on 'session_welcome' calls _subscribe() synchronously. Test tests/unit/eventsub.test.ts:117 'parses_session_welcome_and_subscribes' verifies POST to eventsub/subscriptions endpoint.

criteria.description: Queue processes redemptions in FIFO order
criteria.notes: tests/unit/queue/queue.test.ts:63 'fifo_order' enqueues A,B,C and asserts order.toEqual(['A','B','C']).

criteria.description: 6th queue slot rejected/cancelled when queue at max 5
criteria.notes: tests/unit/queue/queue.test.ts:95 'max_5_slots_rejected' enqueues an over-limit redemption and asserts api.cancelRedemption called (queue.test.ts:114).

criteria.description: MaskAction fires remove-mask hotkey after 30s via fake timers
criteria.notes: tests/unit/mask-action.test.ts:92 jest.advanceTimersByTime(30_000) then asserts remove hotkey invoked (call index 1) and fulfillRedemption called exactly once.

criteria.description: MediaAction cancels redemption on empty meme folder
criteria.notes: tests/actions/media.test.ts:103 'empty meme folder triggers cancel and refund' asserts api.cancelRedemption.toHaveBeenCalledWith('reward-1','redemption-1') and fulfillRedemption NOT called.
tests/actions/media.test.ts:163 jest.advanceTimersByTime(120_000) then asserts api.fulfillRedemption called. Server-side timeout at overlay/server.ts:141 PLAYBACK_TIMEOUT_MS=120_000.
tests/actions/media.test.ts:176 'path traversal attempt is blocked' asserts cancelRedemption called. Defense-in-depth in server.ts:180 rejects ids matching /[\\/]|\.\./.
tests/integration/overlay-server.test.ts:166 'ws_unauthenticated_closed' and :180 'ws_wrong_nonce_closed' both close WS with 1008. Implementation at server.ts:219-223.

criteria.description: Electron BrowserWindow uses contextIsolation, sandbox, nodeIntegration=false
criteria.notes: src/main/window.ts:15-17: contextIsolation: true, sandbox: true, nodeIntegration: false — all security flags set correctly.
